title: 音符盒调教师NoteBlockTweaker
description:
目前增加了一个调音专属物品和音符盒交互界面，还有其他方便红石音乐建造的想法待实现。
A tuning-specific item and a note block interaction GUI have been added. Other ideas to facilitate redstone music construction are yet to be implemented.
body:
原版的音符盒需要一次次的右击才能调整至指定音高，这对于大型的红石音乐项目很不友好。我的Java水平仅限业余，目前只兼容1.21.8+fabric 0.19.2的版本。一个木棍和一个任意木台阶即可合成音“音高注入棒”，手拿“ 音高注入棒”右键音符盒即可打开调音界面。
  In vanilla Minecraft, the note block requires repeated right-clicks to adjust to a specific pitch, which is very pianful for large-scale redstone music projects. My Java skill is only at an amateur level, and currently the mod only supports version 1.21.8 + Fabric 0.19.2. A "Pitch Injector" can be crafted with one stick and any wooden slab. Holding the Pitch Injector and right-clicking a note block opens the tuning GUI.
